title: pelargonium × compactum
intro: Pelargonium × compactum, also known as Dwarf or Compact Zonal Geranium, is a compact and bushy perennial plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds like geraniol and linalool, exhibiting antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × compactum have been associated with various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Pelargonium × compactum can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
